title: Fix ESLint errors in commons-client and clungiverse-client

log.context: Fix ESLint errors in commons-client and clungiverse-client

Both packages now have 0 errors and 0 warnings. Here's what was fixed:

**commons-client (6 errors, 16 warnings → 0)**
- `worn-paths.ts`: Template literal expressions with `number` types fixed by wrapping with `String()` (3 locations, 6 errors total). Also added `// eslint-disable-next-line no-console` for 2 warn calls in catch blocks.
